step_rationale: Tryptophan metabolite; systemic acute-phase response; off-pathway.
mechanism: Acetyl-tryptophan is a tryptophan metabolite reflecting systemic immune activation and acute myocardial injury.

references.title: Plasma Metabolic Profiling and Multiclass Diagnostic Model Development for Stable Angina Pectoris and Acute Myocardial Infarction.
